mission: Provide a low-risk proving ground for validating Playbook repository intelligence integrations.
current_focus: Stabilize the subapp repo truth pack and ingestion contracts.
invariants: Repo truth is committed in-repo and never chat-only.
Truth pack intentionally avoids duplicating generated .playbook runtime artifacts.
next_milestones: Add CI gate to enforce context freshness on phase transitions.
open_questions: Should phase transitions require explicit ADR links in context.json?
